title: Cannot make this lib work on Mac OS at all. PodmanClient().version() fails while `podman version` works
body:
podman-py version: 5.6.0
OS: Mac OS X 15.7



```
% podman version
Client:        Podman Engine
Version:       5.5.0
API Version:   5.5.0
Go Version:    go1.24.3
Built:         Tue May 13 11:59:13 2025
Build Origin:  brew
OS/Arch:       darwin/arm64

Server:       Podman Engine
Version:      5.4.0
API Version:  5.4.0
Go Version:   go1.23.5
Built:        Mon Feb 10 16:00:00 2025
OS/Arch:      linux/arm64
```
```
% podman info -f "{{.Host.RemoteSocket.Path}}"
unix:///run/podman/podman.sock
(backend-test-python) ark@127 bac
```

```
% uv run --python 3.11 python -c 'import podman; print(podman.PodmanClient().version())'
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/podman/api/uds.py", line 41, in connect
    super().connect(netloc)
FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory

The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception:

Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py", line 787, in urlopen
    response = self._make_request(
               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py", line 493, in _make_request
    conn.request(
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py", line 445, in request
    self.endheaders()
  File "/Users/ark/.local/share/uv/python/cpython-3.11.12-macos-aarch64-none/lib/python3.11/http/client.py", line 1298, in endheaders
    self._send_output(message_body, encode_chunked=encode_chunked)
  File "/Users/ark/.local/share/uv/python/cpython-3.11.12-macos-aarch64-none/lib/python3.11/http/client.py", line 1058, in _send_output
    self.send(msg)
  File "/Users/ark/.local/share/uv/python/cpython-3.11.12-macos-aarch64-none/lib/python3.11/http/client.py", line 996, in send
    self.connect()
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/podman/api/uds.py", line 86, in connect
    sock.connect()
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/podman/api/uds.py", line 43, in connect
    raise APIError(f"Unable to make connection to UDS '{netloc}'") from e
podman.errors.exceptions.APIError: Unable to make connection to UDS '/tmp/podmanpy-runtime-dir-fallback-ark/podman/podman.sock'

During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:

Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py", line 486, in send
    resp = conn.urlopen(
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py", line 841, in urlopen
    retries = retries.increment(
              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/retry.py", line 474, in increment
    raise reraise(type(error), error, _stacktrace)
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/util.py", line 38, in reraise
    raise value.with_traceback(tb)
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py", line 787, in urlopen
    response = self._make_request(
               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py", line 493, in _make_request
    conn.request(
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py", line 445, in request
    self.endheaders()
  File "/Users/ark/.local/share/uv/python/cpython-3.11.12-macos-aarch64-none/lib/python3.11/http/client.py", line 1298, in endheaders
    self._send_output(message_body, encode_chunked=encode_chunked)
  File "/Users/ark/.local/share/uv/python/cpython-3.11.12-macos-aarch64-none/lib/python3.11/http/client.py", line 1058, in _send_output
    self.send(msg)
  File "/Users/ark/.local/share/uv/python/cpython-3.11.12-macos-aarch64-none/lib/python3.11/http/client.py", line 996, in send
    self.connect()
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/podman/api/uds.py", line 86, in connect
    sock.connect()
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/podman/api/uds.py", line 43, in connect
    raise APIError(f"Unable to make connection to UDS '{netloc}'") from e
urllib3.exceptions.ProtocolError: ('Connection aborted.', APIError("Unable to make connection to UDS '/tmp/podmanpy-runtime-dir-fallback-ark/podman/podman.sock'"))

During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:

Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/podman/api/client.py", line 440, in _request
    self.request(
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py", line 589, in request
    resp = self.send(prep, **send_kwargs)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py", line 703, in send
    r = adapter.send(request, **kwargs)
        ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py", line 501, in send
    raise ConnectionError(err, request=request)
requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: ('Connection aborted.', APIError("Unable to make connection to UDS '/tmp/podmanpy-runtime-dir-fallback-ark/podman/podman.sock'"))

The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception:

Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<string>", line 1, in <module>
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/podman/client.py", line 205, in version
    return self.system.version(**kwargs)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/podman/domain/system.py", line 100, in version
    response = self.client.get("/version")
               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/podman/api/client.py", line 266, in get
    return self._request(
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/aaa/proj-backend/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/podman/api/client.py", line 452, in _request
    raise APIError(uri.geturl(), explanation=f"{method.upper()} operation failed") from e
podman.errors.exceptions.APIError: http://%2Ftmp%2Fpodmanpy-runtime-dir-fallback-ark%2Fpodman%2Fpodman.sock/v5.6.0/libpod/version (GET operation failed)
```
```
% ls -la /tmp/podmanpy-runtime-dir-fallback-ark/                                        
total 0
drwx------@  2 ark   wheel   64 Oct  3 18:16 .
drwxrwxrwt  10 root  wheel  320 Oct  3 18:16 ..
```



```
% uv run --python 3.11 python -c 'import podman; print(podman.PodmanClient(base_url="unix://run/podman/podman.sock").version())

...
    raise APIError(f"Unable to make connection to UDS '{netloc}'") from e
podman.errors.exceptions.APIError: Unable to make connection to UDS 'run'
```

```
% ls -la /run/podman/podman.sock
ls: /run/podman/podman.sock: No such file or directory

% ls -la /run/            
ls: /run/: No such file or directory

% ls -la /run/user/
ls: /run/user/: No such file or directory
```

comments.body:
Ironically, Docker's Python package actually works with Podman:

```
% python -c 'import docker; print(docker.DockerClient().version())'
{'Platform': {'Name': 'linux/arm64/fedora-41'}, 'Components': [{'Name': 'Podman Engine', 'Version': '5.4.0', 'Details': {'APIVersion': '5.4.0', 'Arch': 'arm64', 'BuildTime': '2025-02-10T16:00:00-08:00', 'Experimental': 'false', 'GitCommit': '', 'GoVersion': 'go1.23.5', 'KernelVersion': '6.12.9-200.fc41.aarch64', 'MinAPIVersion': '4.0.0', 'Os': 'linux'}}, {'Name': 'Conmon', 'Version': 'conmon version 2.1.12, commit: ', 'Details': {'Package': 'conmon-2.1.12-3.fc41.aarch64'}}, {'Name': 'OCI Runtime (crun)', 'Version': 'crun version 1.19.1\ncommit: 3e32a70c93f5aa5fea69b50256cca7fd4aa23c80\nrundir: /run/crun\nspec: 1.0.0\n+SYSTEMD +SELINUX +APPARMOR +CAP +SECCOMP +EBPF +CRIU +LIBKRUN +WASM:wasmedge +YAJL', 'Details': {'Package': 'crun-1.19.1-1.fc41.aarch64'}}], 'Version': '5.4.0', 'ApiVersion': '1.41', 'MinAPIVersion': '1.24', 'GitCommit': '', 'GoVersion': 'go1.23.5', 'Os': 'linux', 'Arch': 'arm64', 'KernelVersion': '6.12.9-200.fc41.aarch64', 'BuildTime': '2025-02-10T16:00:00-08:00'}
```

I found the problem. The fix is in the PR, but I still need to fix the tests. 

@Ark-kun Can you please verify the fix?

@Honny1 Thank you! The fix seems to be working:
```
% uv run python -c 'import podman; print(podman.PodmanClient().version())'                                                   
Warning: Permanently added '[127.0.0.1]:60436' (ED25519) to the list of known hosts.
{'Platform': {'Name': 'linux/arm64/fedora-41'}, 'Components': [{'Name': 'Podman Engine', 'Version': '5.4.0', 'Details': {'APIVersion': '5.4.0', 'Arch': 'arm64', 'BuildTime': '2025-02-10T16:00:00-08:00', 'Experimental': 'false', 'GitCommit': '', 'GoVersion': 'go1.23.5', 'KernelVersion': '6.12.9-200.fc41.aarch64', 'MinAPIVersion': '4.0.0', 'Os': 'linux'}}, {'Name': 'Conmon', 'Version': 'conmon version 2.1.12, commit: ', 'Details': {'Package': 'conmon-2.1.12-3.fc41.aarch64'}}, {'Name': 'OCI Runtime (crun)', 'Version': 'crun version 1.19.1\ncommit: 3e32a70c93f5aa5fea69b50256cca7fd4aa23c80\nrundir: /run/crun\nspec: 1.0.0\n+SYSTEMD +SELINUX +APPARMOR +CAP +SECCOMP +EBPF +CRIU +LIBKRUN +WASM:wasmedge +YAJL', 'Details': {'Package': 'crun-1.19.1-1.fc41.aarch64'}}], 'Version': '5.4.0', 'ApiVersion': '1.41', 'MinAPIVersion': '1.24', 'GitCommit': '', 'GoVersion': 'go1.23.5', 'Os': 'linux', 'Arch': 'arm64', 'KernelVersion': '6.12.9-200.fc41.aarch64', 'BuildTime': '2025-02-10T16:00:00-08:00'}
```

P.S. The `Warning: Permanently added '[127.0.0.1]:60436' (ED25519) to the list of known hosts.` message was a bit weird here.
